title: Amazing Abby - Adore - Acrylic Apothecary Jars (3-Piece Set), Plastic Jars with Lids, Bathroom Canisters, Vanity Organizers, Candy Buffet, Wedding Display, BPA-Free and Shatter-Proof
description:
About this item
[PERFECT QUALITY] Made of premium quality acrylic plastic. Will not shatter like glass or ceramic. BPA-free and lead-free. Safe and durable. Ideal for your use everyday and everywhere.
[MULTIPLE USES] A must-have apothecary jar set to keep various items: candies, snacks, decorative items, Q-Tips, cotton balls, beauty blenders, makeup sponges, bath salts, bath sponges, shower balls, loofah pads, laundry detergent pods. Suitable for multiple uses: candy buffet, wedding display, decorative jars, bathroom canisters, vanity organizers.
[CLASSICAL DESIGN] A simple classical design with ample capacity: 52 oz, 46 oz, 46 oz. Suitable for your own creative displays and original settings.
[GREAT GIFT] A great present for you and your loved ones. An awesome gift idea for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, and any other special occasions.
[MODERN ELEGANCE] Crystal-clear and shiny. Stylish and modern design. An elegant object for any place at home.
reviews_5s:
Works great for bath salts and bath bombs. Good quality. Size- maybe a tad smaller than expected but overall not too small. Very sturdy!I really only needed one jar, but this set of three shapes was too good to resist. I use one of the taller jars near my tub to hold bath bombs (Yay for acrylic!). Haven't found a use for the other two jars yet, but nice to have them!Super cute, seems durable and a fraction of the price for glass onesCute but would have preferred a seal on the lid.These jars are lovely. The acrylic is very clear and each jar was packed nicely, so there were no scratches when I took them out of the box. I am impressed.
I am using two as "marble jars" (but with big pompoms instead of marbles) to help my kids stay motivated with school and chores. I'm happy to have found these jars because they're attractive enough to keep out on the counter and I won't have to worry about glass shattering every time my kids go to put a pompom in the jar.

Things to know:
-The lids of the jars fit well but are not tight, so are easy to lift off.
-The opening of each jar is big enough for an adult hand to fit in. (3&3/4in. diameter for the non-footed jars and 4&5/8in. for the footed.)
-The lids of the two non-footed jars are interchangeable.

Good quality and design!I really like this set of apothecary canisters. The acrylic is very clear and good quality.

One side note: when I first ordered these I only received 2 of the 3 canisters and no lids. I had to request a replacement from Amazon who made me return the 2 canisters (bad service making me have to go to a UPS store to ship them back when it was their goof).

Now that I have my replacement order I am happy with them.Play Video
I used this to hold my bath salt, bath bombs, and loofahs. This is a great set! You could use anywhere in the house to organize your pantry, coffee bar, or bathroom. It is plastic NOT glass but that is a PRO to me! I don’t want to worry about breaking. LOVE this set!These are fantastic! They are beautiful and solid. AAA++++I bought this for clear containers with a little personality for my bathroom and laundry and I'm delighted. They're as clear and sturdy as a heavy glass jar, but I don't have to worry about them shattering if they get bumped. I might have to get another set as my toddler keeps taking them to put their own toys inside (which isn't stressful because I don't think they could break it).I bought these to put in my 3 year old daughter’s bathroom to hold her bath crayons, tablets to color the bath water, and bath salts. They’re beautiful and one of the only options I found for apothecary jars that are made in plastic so far safer around a small child than a glass version would be. I have no complaints about them whatsoever. They’re well made and thick enough to feel high quality while remaining lightweight, the plastic is perfectly clear so they look like glass and the lids fit well. I’ll be buying another set to use in my master bath and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to others.
reviews_1s: Product came in and it obviously had been used a returned because the containers were sticky and inside you could see red specs of stuck on candy all over the sides of product. Product was also plastic, which I knew, but the plastic has scratch marks inside the containers, because they were used before. Extremely disappointed.I'm not sure who wrote good reviews, but these look like they came from the 99cent store. Not even a seal on the lids. If they were $5, ok. Definitely not worth 37.This is not what you are getting. Do not buy these. They are really small and only cylinder not the nice design they show. The lid so it is not air tight. Also they do not have a seal on mine because 35 dollars is just too much for the simple jars I received
